description: Windows Start-menu replacement (Avalonia / .NET) with Windows 7, Windows 11, Mint Cinnamon and Classic styles, built on modern Windows shell metadata.

script: if ($cmd) { & cmd.exe /c $cmd } else { Write-Host 'MenYou uninstall entry not found.' }

post_install: Write-Host 'MenYou installed. Press Shift+Win to open the menu.' -ForegroundColor Green
